description: Externalized source crawler, two-layer browser fallback, and vector readiness governance defaults.

ctext-sanguozhi.suggestion: HTTP 403 detected. Auto-route to browser-static-html fallback and keep source layer as history.
ctext-sanguozhi.rationale: ctext commonly blocks default CLI user-agent and needs browser-like fetch semantics.

rekowiki-musou-character-list.suggestion: HTTP 403 detected. Auto-route to browser-static-html fallback and keep source layer as game/worldbuilding.
rekowiki-musou-character-list.rationale: fandom mirrors frequently reject non-browser clients with 403.

chiculture-romance-vs-history.suggestion: HTTP 403 detected. Auto-route to browser-static-html fallback with strict citation extraction.
chiculture-romance-vs-history.rationale: site may enforce anti-bot policies for non-browser requests.

vectorGate.description: Phase 24 registers governance policy for vector ingestion readiness without changing path/env driven CLI defaults.
